name: Pico DRUMS
description: 3HP dual-voice drum sampler. 64 preset samples per drum at 12-bit/44kHz, 8MB memory, independent pitch/decay/level per voice. CV control of drum 1 parameters including sample-select at 1V/oct. Sub-5ms trigger latency.

controls.name: Pitch 1
controls.description: Sets playback pitch of drum 1's sample. Under CV assignment also becomes the 1V/oct chromatic control.
controls.detail: Wide pitch range · negative tuning possible

controls.name: Decay 1
controls.description: Truncates sample tail via internal envelope. CCW: very short · CW: full sample length.

controls.name: Level 1
controls.description: Output level for drum 1 on the mixed output.

controls.name: Sample 1 / Bank button
controls.description: Selects one of 64 samples for drum 1. Short press steps; long press enters save/load bank.
controls.detail: 64 factory samples · user samples via USB programmer

controls.name: Sample 2 button
controls.description: Selects one of 64 samples for drum 2.
controls.detail: No CV over sample-select on drum 2

controls.name: CV Assign
controls.description: Cycles which drum-1 parameter the CV input modulates; LED colour indicates the target.
controls.detail: Green: pitch · Red: decay · Orange/Yellow: volume · (4th): sample-select at 1V/oct

controls.name: Exclusive switch
controls.description: Sets how the two voices interact when triggered simultaneously (retrigger / mute / overlap).

inputs.name: TRIG 1
inputs.description: Trigger input for drum 1. Sub-5ms latency.

inputs.name: CV 1
inputs.description: CV input modulating drum 1's currently selected parameter (pitch, decay, volume or sample-select).

outputs.name: OUT
outputs.description: Mono mixed output carrying both drum voices after their individual level controls.

behaviors.name: CV target cycling
behaviors.description: Each press of the CV Assign button advances the CV routing: pitch → decay → volume → sample-select. LED colour reflects the current target.

behaviors.name: Chromatic sample-select
behaviors.description: When assigned to sample-select, incoming CV advances the sample in semitone steps at 1V/oct, turning drum 1 into a pitch-addressable 64-slot sample player.

behaviors.name: Exclusive retrigger
behaviors.description: Exclusive switch defines whether simultaneous triggers let both voices overlap or cut one for the other — crucial for kick/hat choke behaviour from a single step sequencer.

behaviors.name: Custom sample upload
behaviors.description: The separate Pico Drum Programmer loads user WAVs into the module's 8MB flash via USB. Each bank still caps at 64 samples per drum.

behaviors.name: Preset save/load
behaviors.description: Up to six combinations of sample selections and parameter settings can be saved as presets and recalled during performance.

patchIdeas.name: Kick + hat drum voice
patchIdeas.patch: Step sequencer → TRIG1 (kick) · TRIG2 (hat) · short Decay 2 · Exclusive off
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DRUMS:
* Sample 1: kick
* Sample 2: hat
* Decay 2: CCW
- Seq (Trig1) t> Pico Drums (TRIG 1)
- Seq (Trig2) t> Pico Drums (TRIG 2)
- Pico Drums (OUT) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Melodic drum 1
patchIdeas.patch: CV Assign → pitch · quantized sequencer → CV1 · trigger → TRIG1
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DRUMS:
* CV Assign: pitch
- Quant (CV) p> Pico Drums (CV 1)
- Seq (Gate) g> Pico Drums (TRIG 1)
- Pico Drums (OUT) -> VCF (In)

patchIdeas.name: Sample-scrolled rhythm
patchIdeas.patch: CV Assign → sample-select · stepped CV → CV1 · each step picks a different sample
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DRUMS:
* CV Assign: sample-select
- Seq (CV) >> Pico Drums (CV 1)
- Clock (Out) c> Pico Drums (TRIG 1)
- Pico Drums (OUT) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Choked kick/clap
patchIdeas.patch: Exclusive on · TRIG1 = kick · TRIG2 = clap · common clock with offbeat splits
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DRUMS:
* Exclusive: on
- Seq (Trig1) t> Pico Drums (TRIG 1)
- Seq (Trig2) t> Pico Drums (TRIG 2)
- Pico Drums (OUT) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Dynamic decay accents
patchIdeas.patch: CV Assign → decay · accent gate → CV1 · trigger → TRIG1
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DRUMS:
* CV Assign: decay
- Accent (Gate) g> Pico Drums (CV 1)
- Seq (Gate) g> Pico Drums (TRIG 1)
- Pico Drums (OUT) -> Mixer (In)
